name: Stickboy Defender
description: Stickboy Defender is an action merge-and-shoot game. Recruit stickman units, drag them to the wall and merge identical units to create stronger fighters. Survive waves of enemies, upgrade your damage, income and prices, spin the lucky wheel for bonuses and collect offline earnings. Buy new troops in the shop, activate boosts like the delivery drone, auto-merge and coin multipliers, and clear every wave to claim victory.
instructions: Tap and drag units to the wall to place them Drag identical units onto each other to merge them into a stronger unit Tap buttons to upgrade damage income and prices and to buy new troops
